Class ArtistUtils

java.lang.Object
com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.utils.ArtistUtils
public final class ArtistUtils extends Object
Utility class for resolving artist display names from Song entities.

Centralizes the artist name resolution pattern that was previously duplicated across at least 8 classes: ListeningHistoryViewModel, TopSongsViewModel, AnalyticsController, TopArtistsViewModel, YearEndReportViewModel, PlaylistViewBuilder, SongCell, and CardFactory.

All methods are static. This class is not instantiable.

Time Complexity: O(1) — operates on the first element of the artist set.
Space Complexity: O(1)

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    static final String
    UNKNOWN_ARTIST
    Default string returned when no artist can be resolved.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static String
    getArtistName(Artist artist)
    Returns the name of the given artist, or "Unknown Artist" if the artist or its name is null.
    static String
    getPrimaryArtistName(Song song)
    Returns the name of the first artist on the given song, or "Unknown Artist" if the song has no artists or is null.

  • Field Details

    • UNKNOWN_ARTIST

      public static final String UNKNOWN_ARTIST
      Default string returned when no artist can be resolved.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

  • Method Details

    • getPrimaryArtistName

      public static String getPrimaryArtistName(Song song)
      Returns the name of the first artist on the given song, or "Unknown Artist" if the song has no artists or is null.

      This replaces the repeated inline pattern: 

        song.getArtists().stream()
      .findFirst()
      .map(Artist::getName)
      .orElse("Unknown Artist")
      Parameters:
      song - the song to resolve the artist name from; may be null
      Returns:
      the primary artist name, or "Unknown Artist"

    • getArtistName

      public static String getArtistName(Artist artist)
      Returns the name of the given artist, or "Unknown Artist" if the artist or its name is null.

      Useful when you already have an Artist reference but want a guaranteed non-null display string.

      Parameters:
      artist - the artist to resolve the name from; may be null
      Returns:
      the artist name, or "Unknown Artist"
